warnings: This is the FINAL page (page 94) of the entire document for this house. No printed page number is visible on this cover-style page (doc_page recorded as null, matching the convention established for house #3's equivalent series-cover page).
House #4's render on this cover (2-story, white with balcony) is consistent with the elevations extracted on architecture sheets A-09 through A-12 (pages 9-12).
This confirms house #4 (บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_02) = 'บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 4' in the DPT's official series naming, 180 sqm, matching the price-reference table on หน้า93.
